commands: VERSION=$(grep '^version' apps/discordsh/discordsh-bot/Cargo.toml | head -1 | sed 's/.*"\(.*\)"/\1/') && docker tag kbve/discordsh-bot:latest kbve/discordsh-bot:$VERSION && echo "Tagged kbve/discordsh-bot:$VERSION"

VERSION=$(grep '^version' apps/discordsh/discordsh-bot/Cargo.toml | head -1 | sed 's/.*"\(.*\)"/\1/') && docker tag kbve/discordsh-bot:latest kbve/discordsh-bot:$VERSION && docker tag kbve/discordsh-bot:latest ghcr.io/kbve/discordsh-bot:latest && docker tag kbve/discordsh-bot:latest ghcr.io/kbve/discordsh-bot:$VERSION && echo "Tagged kbve/discordsh-bot:$VERSION and ghcr.io/kbve/discordsh-bot:$VERSION"
